name: Ideal Weight Calculator
desc: Calculate your ideal weight for your height using Lorentz and Devine formulas.
description: Calculate your ideal weight for your height using Lorentz and Devine formulas.
seo_description: Use our free ideal weight calculator to quickly estimate rango_min_kg, rango_max_kg based on altura_cm, genero. No registration needed.
example_label: Determine weight ideal to hombre of 175cm of height
result_context: The rango of weight saludable se basa in IMC 18.5-24.9; The fórmulas Lorentz and Devine ofrecen estimaciones alternativas.
formula_display: Weight minimum = 18.5 × height (m)²; weight maximum = 24.9 × height (m)²
steps: Convierte height a meters (ej: 175 cm = 1.75 m)
Opcional: Calculate fórmulas Lorentz and Devine to referencia
mistakes: Confusing weight ideal with weight of model (puede ser insalubre)
No Consider complexión ósea (huesos grandes = weight greater saludable)
Use fórmulas antiguas as Hamwi without actualizar a evidencia current
